languages.text: "Император внемлет твоим мольбам, еретик! Прими же его милосердный ответ!"

traits.locale_text: "Император внемлет твоим мольбам, еретик! Прими же его милосердный ответ!"

languages.text: "The Emperor will hear your pleas, heretic! Accept his merciful answer!"
languages.original_text: "Император внемлет твоим мольбам, еретик! Прими же его милосердный ответ!"

traits.locale_text: "The Emperor will hear your pleas, heretic! Accept his merciful answer!"
"The Emperor will hear your pleas, heretic! Accept his merciful answer!"
"The Emperor will hear your pleas, heretic! Accept his merciful answer!"

languages.text: "Der Imperator wird Euer Flehen erhören, Ketzer! Akzeptiert seine gnädige Antwort."
languages.original_text: "The Emperor will hear your pleas, heretic! Accept his merciful answer!"

traits.locale_text: "Der Imperator wird Euer Flehen erhören, Ketzer! Akzeptiert seine gnädige Antwort."

languages.text: “帝皇自会听到你的祈求，异端！接受祂仁慈的裁决吧！”
languages.original_text: "The Emperor will hear your pleas, heretic! Accept his merciful answer!"

traits.locale_text: “帝皇自会听到你的祈求，异端！接受祂仁慈的裁决吧！”

languages.text: « L'Empereur écoutera votre plaidoyer, hérétique ! Acceptez sa réponse miséricordieuse ! »
languages.original_text: "The Emperor will hear your pleas, heretic! Accept his merciful answer!"

traits.locale_text: « L'Empereur écoutera votre plaidoyer, hérétique ! Acceptez sa réponse miséricordieuse ! »

languages.text: «¡El Emperador escuchará tus súplicas, hereje! ¡Acepta su misericordiosa respuesta!».
languages.original_text: "The Emperor will hear your pleas, heretic! Accept his merciful answer!"

traits.locale_text: «¡El Emperador escuchará tus súplicas, hereje! ¡Acepta su misericordiosa respuesta!».

languages.text: "İmparator yalvarışlarını duyacak kâfir! Onun merhametli yanıtını kabul et!"
languages.original_text: "The Emperor will hear your pleas, heretic! Accept his merciful answer!"

traits.locale_text: "İmparator yalvarışlarını duyacak kâfir! Onun merhametli yanıtını kabul et!"

languages.text: 「皇帝はあなたの願いを聞きます、異端者よ！彼の慈悲深い答えを受け入れなさい！」
languages.original_text: "The Emperor will hear your pleas, heretic! Accept his merciful answer!"

traits.locale_text: 「皇帝はあなたの願いを聞きます、異端者よ！彼の慈悲深い答えを受け入れなさい！」
